Name: Venusaur-EX
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.
Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: M Venusaur-EX
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Mega-Evolution-Rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Caterpie
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.
Flavor-Text: For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antennae on its head to drive away enemies.

Name: Metapod
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.
Effects: During your opponent’s next turn, if this Pokémon would be damaged by an attack, prevent that attack’s damage done to this Pokémon if that damage is 60 or less.
Flavor-Text: A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.

Name: Butterfree
Effects: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward. If you attached Energy in this way, heal 40 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.

Name: Paras
Effects: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Burrows under the ground to gnaw on tree roots. The mushrooms on its back absorb most of the nutrition.

Name: Parasect
Effects: Choose 3 of your Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a different type of basic Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
Flavor-Text: The larger the mushroom on its back grows, the stronger the mushroom spores it scatters.

Name: Tangela
Effects: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It tangles any moving thing with its vines. Their subtle shaking is ticklish if you get ensnared.

Name: Pinsir
Effects: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
This attack does 20 more damage for each [C] in your opponent’s Active Pokémon’s Retreat Cost.
Flavor-Text: It swings its long pincer horns wildly to attack. During cold periods, it hides deep in forests.

Name: Leafeon-EX
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 30 more damage and heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Charizard-EX
Effects: Attach a [R] Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.
Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: M Charizard-EX
Effects: Flip a coin for each [R] Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 more damage for each heads.
Mega-Evolution-Rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Ninetales-EX
Effects: Discard a [R] Energy card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.
Flip a coin. If tails, discard a [R] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Ponyta
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent’s next turn.

Name: Rapidash
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent’s next turn.
This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Flavor-Text: Very competitive, this Pokémon will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

Name: Magmar
Effects: Discard a [R] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Found near the mouth of a volcano. This fire-breather’s body temperature is nearly 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit.

Name: Blastoise-EX
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: M Blastoise-EX
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, discard 2 [W] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Mega-Evolution-Rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Shellder
Flavor-Text: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

Name: Cloyster
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and discard an Energy attached to that Pokémon.
Flip 5 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.
Flavor-Text: Cloyster that live in seas with harsh tidal currents grow large, sharp spikes on their shells.

Name: Krabby
Flavor-Text: If it senses danger approaching, it cloaks itself with bubbles from its mouth so it will look bigger.

Name: Magikarp
Effects: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing.
Flavor-Text: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

Name: Gyarados
Effects: This attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s). (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Flip a coin for each [W] Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.
Flavor-Text: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

Name: Vaporeon-EX
Effects: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
This attack does 130 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Articuno
Effects: Search your deck for up to 3 [W] Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Flavor-Text: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

Name: Pikachu
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.
Flavor-Text: It raises its tail to check its surroundings. The tail is sometimes struck by lightning in this pose.

Name: Raichu
Effects: This attack does 20 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon.
Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: When its electricity builds, its muscles are stimulated, and it becomes more aggressive than usual.

Name: Jolteon-EX
Effects: This attack’s damage isn’t affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
During your opponent’s next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Zapdos
Effects: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Flavor-Text: A legendary Pokémon that is said to live in thunderclouds. It freely controls lightning bolts.

Name: Zubat
Effects: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Flavor-Text: Even though it has no eyes, it can sense obstacles using ultrasonic waves it emits from it mouth.

Name: Golbat
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.
Effects: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent’s Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Flavor-Text: Once it bites, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.

Name: Slowpoke
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.
Discard a [P] Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, put an Item card from your discard pile into your hand.
Flavor-Text: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.

Name: Gastly
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.
Flavor-Text: Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.

Name: Haunter
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may leave both Active Pokémon Confused.
Effects: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. That Pokémon can’t retreat during your opponent’s next turn.
Flavor-Text: It licks with its gaseous tongue to steal the victim’s life force. It lurks in darkness for prey.

Name: Gengar
Effects: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.
If your opponent’s Active Pokémon has 3 or more damage counters on it, that Pokémon is Knocked Out.
Flavor-Text: Hiding in people’s shadows at night, it absorbs their heat. The chill it causes makes the victims shake.

Name: Jynx
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may heal 10 damage from your Active Pokémon.
Effects: The Defending Pokémon can’t retreat during your opponent’s next turn.
Flavor-Text: It wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

Name: Meowstic-EX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.
Effects: This attack’s damage isn’t affected by Weakness or Resistance.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Diglett
Effects: Look at the top card of your opponent’s deck. Then, you may have your opponent shuffle his or her deck.
Flavor-Text: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears aboveground.

Name: Dugtrio
Effects: This attack does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
This attack’s damage isn’t affected by Resistance.
Flavor-Text: In battle, it digs through the ground and strikes the unsuspecting foe from an unexpected direction.

Name: Machop
Flavor-Text: It hefts a Graveler repeatedly to strengthen its entire body. It uses every type of martial arts.

Name: Machoke
Flavor-Text: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

Name: Machamp
Ability-Effect: Each of your [F] Pokémon’s attacks do 20 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Effects: During your opponent’s next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 40 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Flavor-Text: Its four ruggedly developed arms can launch a flurry of 1,000 punches in just two seconds.

Name: Geodude
Effects: This attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

Name: Graveler
Effects: This Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.
Flavor-Text: With a free and uncaring nature, it doesn’t mind if pieces break off while it rolls down mountains.

Name: Golem
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack 30 more damage.
This Pokémon does 100 damage to itself.
Flavor-Text: It tumbles down mountains, leaving grooves from peak to base. Stay clear of these grooves.

Name: Golem-EX
Effects: This Pokémon does 60 damage to itself.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Hitmonlee
Effects: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Flavor-Text: The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.

Name: Hitmonchan
Effects: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.
Flavor-Text: The arm-twisting punches it throws pulverize even concrete. It rests after three minutes of fighting.

Name: Rhyhorn
Effects: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.
Flavor-Text: It is inept at turning because of its four short legs. It can only charge and run in one direction.

Name: Clefairy
Effects: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.

Name: Clefable
Effects: Switch 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon with your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
During your opponent’s next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 30 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Flavor-Text: Its hearing is so acute it can hear a pin drop over half a mile away. It lives on quiet mountains.

Name: Mr. Mime
Ability-Effect: Prevent all damage done to your Benched Pokémon by attacks.
Effects: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.
Flavor-Text: It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.

Name: Meowth
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon. If tails, this Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.
Flavor-Text: Adores round objects. It wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

Name: Persian
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
Flavor-Text: Its lithe muscles allow it to walk without making a sound. It attacks in an instant.

Name: Doduo
Effects: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.
Draw 2 cards.
Flavor-Text: The brains in its two heads appear to communicate emotions to each other with a telepathic power.

Name: Dodrio
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active Pokémon’s Retreat Cost is [C][C] less.
Effects: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.
Flavor-Text: An odd species that is rarely found. The three heads respectively represent joy, sadness, and anger.

Name: Tauros
Effects: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.
Flip a coin for each damage counter on this Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.
Flavor-Text: After heightening its will to fight by whipping itself with its three tails, it charges at full speed.

Name: Snorlax
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon is Asleep, flip 2 coins instead of 1 between turns. If either of them is tails, this Pokémon is still Asleep.
Effects: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon. This Pokémon is now Asleep.
Flavor-Text: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

Name: Clemont
Description: Search your deck for up to 4 [L] Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Crushing Hammer
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.
Item-Rule: You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Energy Switch
Description: Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.
Item-Rule: You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Evosoda
Description: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can’t use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
Item-Rule: You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Imakuni?
Description: Your Active Pokémon is now Confused.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Maintenance
Description: Shuffle 2 cards from your hand into your deck. (If you can’t shuffle 2 cards into your deck, you can’t play this card.) Then, draw a card.
Item-Rule: You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Max Revive
Description: Put a Pokémon from your discard pile on top of your deck.
Item-Rule: You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Olympia
Description: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal 30 damage from the Pokémon you moved to your Bench.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Poké Ball
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Item-Rule: You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Pokémon Center Lady
Description: Heal 60 damage and remove all Special Conditions from 1 of your Pokémon.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Pokémon Fan Club
Description: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Revitalizer
Description: Put 2 [G] Pokémon from your discard pile into your hand.
Item-Rule: You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Red Card
Description: Your opponent shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck and draws 4 cards.
Item-Rule: You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Shauna
Description: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 5 cards.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Team Flare Grunt
Description: Discard an Energy attached to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Chikorita
Effects: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Running around, climbing trees, playing hide-and-seek! Another wonderful day begins!

Name: Shroomish
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Confused.
Flavor-Text: I wonder if I would look a little cuter with a beautiful flower?

Name: Charmander
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: My Charmander is so rambunctious! I wonder if we can become good friends?

Name: Charmeleon
Effects: Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Flavor-Text: My precious friend who is always with me. I have so many things I want to tell you.

Name: Charizard
Effects: Choose 1 of this Pokémon’s attacks from its previous Evolutions and use it as this attack.
This Pokémon can’t use Combustion Blast during your next turn.
Flavor-Text: No matter what happens, if we stick together, we can get past it. Forever and ever.

Name: Flareon-EX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move a [R] Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to this Pokémon.
Effects: This attack does 20 more damage for each [R] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Snorunt
Flavor-Text: What a delicious-looking snowman! I think I’ll sneak a bite. It’s OK…no one’s looking, right?

Name: Froslass
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon and is Knocked Out by damage from an opponent’s attack, flip a coin. If heads, the Attacking Pokémon is Knocked Out.
Effects: Put 4 damage counters on your opponent’s Pokémon in any way you like.
Flavor-Text: Spring is already here, so goodbye…

Name: Raichu
Effects: This attack does 20 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon.
Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: The plan for today is to do nothing. My awesome tail is all curled up, and my ears are tired, too.

Name: Dedenne
Effects: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon. This Pokémon is now Asleep.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
Flavor-Text: Crackle…buzz…Dedenne…?! Beep…

Name: Wobbuffet
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, each Pokémon in play, in each player’s hand, and in each player’s discard pile has no Abilities (except for [P] Pokémon).
Effects: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: When she’s surrounded by cushions and dressers that I like, she looks just like a princess!

Name: Gulpin
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
Flavor-Text: When Mom gets in the kitchen, the happiest things happen. I can feel my mouth watering!

Name: Jirachi
Effects: Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Flavor-Text: The twinkle of the stars. The destiny of love. A miracle that grants wishes in the night sky.

Name: Espurr
Effects: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
Flavor-Text: My number one. Exceptionally cute. A little princess.

Name: Meowstic
Effects: Move as many damage counters on your opponent’s Pokémon as you like to any of your opponent’s other Pokémon in any way you like.
Does 10 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Intense silence. Two lamplights. Keep waiting for night to end.

Name: Yveltal
Effects: Attach a [D] Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon can’t attack during your next turn.
Flavor-Text: Hidden away in its jet-black wings is a red passion.

Name: Flabébé
Flavor-Text: It’s OK. No one will take away your flower. You look cute even when you’re angry.

Name: Floette
Effects: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent’s Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Flavor-Text: The five of us team up to be the Pretty Young Girl Force! We’ll show you some beautiful moves!

Name: Swirlix
Effects: Remove all Special Conditions from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: My fluffy heart makes me feel like a marshmallow. A thrilling macaron full of colorful magic. Everybody’s crazy about the taste of candy! ☆

Name: Slurpuff
Effects: Draw 3 cards.
Flavor-Text: The cakes Slurpuff makes always look just like that one Pokémon it likes.

Name: Sylveon-EX
Effects: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage.
Move a [Y] Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal 50 damage from that Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Diancie
Effects: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent’s next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.
Heal 30 damage from each of your [Y] Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Open the magic door and a dream-colored party will start again today. I’ll teach you the secret password.

Name: Swablu
Effects: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Wings and beaks. I like yours, and I like mine, too.

Name: Altaria
Effects: If you have any [Y] Pokémon on your Bench, this attack does 30 more damage.
Flavor-Text: This fluffiness makes everyone go crazy. Is it really that charming?

Name: Fletchling
Effects: Search your deck for up to 2 Fletchling, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Flavor-Text: Little friends, thanks for always helping me look so cute!

Name: Floral Crown
Description: At the end of your opponent’s turn, heal 20 damage from the Basic Pokémon this card is attached to.
Tool-Rule: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn’t already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

Name: Wally
Description: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-EX) and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Name: Flareon-EX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move a [R] Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to this Pokémon.
Effects: This attack does 20 more damage for each [R] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Pikachu
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.
Flavor-Text: A yellow body is proof of good health. If you touch its bright-red cheeks, you’ll see its shining, smiling face!

Name: Gardevoir-EX
Effects: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
During your opponent’s next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: M Gardevoir-EX
Effects: This attack does 30 damage times the amount of [Y] Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.
Mega-Evolution-Rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Sylveon-EX
Effects: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage.
Move a [Y] Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal 50 damage from that Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Jolteon-EX
Effects: This attack’s damage isn’t affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
During your opponent’s next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.
ex-Rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Team Flare Grunt
Description: Discard an Energy attached to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
Supporter-Rule: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).
